title: Write-command feedback and safety
objective: Make write-capable commands explicit about dry-run, planned changes, applied changes, cleanup, and idempotency.
description: Hardens init, analyze, doctor, prepare, and migrate based on baseline gaps.
parallel_safe_reason: Write-command behavior must be validated coherently across shared init/migrate/doctor flows.
must: Add no-write dry-run assertions where applicable.
Add idempotency coverage or document why not applicable.
Report planned and applied changes clearly.
Validate temp cleanup on failures where feasible.
not_included: Adding changelog command; covered by v47.
Moving command modules; covered by slice-06.
acceptance: Dry-run paths do not write project files.
Applied changes are reported in human output.
Doctor fix dry-run reports planned fixes without applying them.
Migrate warns and points to dry-run before writes.
validation_hints: Use temp dirs and snapshot file lists before/after dry-run.
